<!-- Thanks for contributing a theme to Pelton! -->

## What is this?

<!-- New theme, an update to an existing one, or a fix? One line is fine. -->

- Theme name:
- Folder: `themes/`
- [ ] New theme
- [ ] Update to an existing theme
- [ ] Something else (docs, tooling, fix)

## Checklist

> [!IMPORTANT]
> CI validates every `.peltontheme` on this PR. You can run the same checks
> locally with `python3 scripts/validate_theme.py`.

- [ ] My theme lives in `themes/<my-theme>/`.
- [ ] The folder contains a **LICENSE** (required).
- [ ] The folder contains at least one **`.peltontheme`** file (more if it ships variants).
- [ ] I wrote a `README.md` describing the theme (the metadata header is added by CI — do not write it yourself).
- [ ] No remote `url()` or `@import`; fonts and images are bundled inside the file.
- [ ] The theme imports and applies cleanly in Pelton.
- [ ] A preview screenshot is included _(recommended, not required)_.

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: credits, inspiration, known quirks. -->
